# PERF-108 positive: sort.Search in a loop
lang: go
file: PERF-108-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sort"

func Lookup(values []int, queries []int) []int {
	out := make([]int, len(queries))
	for i, q := range queries {
		idx := sort.Search(len(values), func(j int) bool { return values[j] >= q })
		out[i] = idx
	}
	return out
}
